compiled_state.title: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b: replace reject block with warn block
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What

Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b to replace the `size_action == reject` exit-1 block with a `size_action == warn` informational echo block. The `2>/dev/null` suppression on the classifier invocation (~line 125) is intentionally preserved.

## testing_mode: UPDATE

## TDD Requirement

Task 1 structural RED check (`test_review_workflow_has_warn_path`) must fail before this task and pass after.

## Files to Modify

### plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md — Step 3b

REMOVE the block:
```bash
if [[ "$SIZE_ACTION" == "reject" ]]; then
  echo "REVIEW_REJECTED: diff exceeds 600 scorable lines. See large-diff-splitting-guide.md."
  exit 1
fi
```

ADD the block:
```bash
if [[ "$SIZE_ACTION" == "warn" ]]; then
  echo "SIZE_WARNING: ${DIFF_SIZE_LINES} scorable lines (≥600 threshold) — proceeding with review"
fi
```

Keep the `2>/dev/null` on the classifier invocation line (~line 125) — SIZE_WARNING is emitted to stderr there, but the workflow echoes it to the user from the JSON `DIFF_SIZE_LINES` field instead.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Universal**
- [ ] Tests pass
  Verify: `bash tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh 2>&1 | tail -5`
- [ ] Lint/format clean
  Verify: `make lint 2>&1 | tail -3`

**Task-specific**
- [ ] REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b contains `SIZE_ACTION.*warn` block
  Verify: `grep -c 'SIZE_ACTION.*warn\|size_action.*warn' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -v '^0$' && echo PASS`
- [ ] REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b has no `SIZE_ACTION.*reject` block
  Verify: `! grep -q 'SIZE_ACTION.*reject' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md && echo PASS`
- [ ] No `exit 1` tied to size_action in Step 3b
  Verify: `! grep -A3 'SIZE_ACTION.*warn' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -q 'exit 1' && echo PASS`
- [ ] large-diff-splitting-guide.md reference removed from REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b
  Verify: `! grep -q 'large-diff-splitting-guide' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md && echo PASS`
- [ ] Structural test passes: test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh test_review_workflow_has_warn_path
  Verify: `bash tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh test_review_workflow_has_warn_path 2>&1 | grep PASS`
